description: Sector overlay for U.S. broadcast, digital media, publishing, advertising, political communications, sponsorship disclosure, and consumer-facing media documentation.

metadata.scope: United States sector overlay controls for Media. Intended to be used with us/core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from U.S. federal statutes, regulations, agency guidance, regulator materials, and sector frameworks available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance. State, territorial, tribal, and local obligations may impose additional requirements.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: FCC broadcast, sponsorship identification, political broadcasting, and public inspection file framework
Children's Online Privacy Protection Act materials

rules.title: FCC broadcast authorization, station, or public-file evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for FCC broadcast station, license, call sign, sponsorship identification, public inspection file, or political file evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, federal/state interaction, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: FCC broadcast and media bureau materials

rules.title: Advertising and endorsement disclosure controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for truthful advertising, endorsement disclosure, sponsored content, influencer disclosure, or claim-substantiation controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, federal/state interaction, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Political communication disclosure evidence is present where election content is described
rules.summary: Checks for public communication, independent expenditure, paid-for-by disclaimer, political advertising, or FEC disclosure evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, federal/state interaction, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Children-directed media privacy controls are present where child audiences are referenced
rules.summary: Checks for COPPA, verifiable parental consent, child data, children under 13, or child-directed service controls.
